title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at ABB India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at ABB India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? ABB India Capital India in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India Capital India:
ABB India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
